description_long: This is a round-bodied ceramic vase with a narrow, flared neck and two small loop handles on either side of the upper body. The neck features a crosshatched pattern, while the body is decorated with vertical stripes that alternate between a light beige and a darker, earthy brown. The lower half of the vase is predominantly a solid dark brown, contrasting with the lighter upper portion. One handle is accompanied by a small sculpted animal or decorative figure, adding a unique ornamental touch. The surface shows signs of wear and some chipping, indicating age or frequent use.
description: A round, striped ceramic vase with a flared neck, two loop handles, and a small sculpted figure, featuring earthy brown and beige tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flared neck, both loop handles, and the small sculpted figure on the right handle.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back handle and the striped pattern, with the sculpted figure not visible.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with both handles visible and the sculpted figure on the left handle.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the sculpted figure and the back handle, with the vertical stripes and color contrast evident.
